subcodes.first_line: O thou steadfast companion, O thou loyal friend! The tribulations and afflictions that befell that oppressed and wretched one at the hands of the wicked people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آقا یار اى یار وفادار بلایا و مصائبى که بر آن مظلوم زار از قوم فجار وارد
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
